hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f && [ -n "$f" ] && git add "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true
cat >/dev/null || true; git rev-parse --git-dir >/dev/null 2>&1 && code-review-graph update --skip-flows --repo "/Users/guillaume/Projects/job-tendencies" || true
cat >/dev/null || true; git rev-parse --git-dir >/dev/null 2>&1 && code-review-graph status --repo "/Users/guillaume/Projects/job-tendencies" || echo 'Not a git repo, skipping'
